description_long: This handbag features a structured, rectangular body with a smooth, light beige exterior that mimics a subtle woodgrain or striped pattern. It is equipped with a single, sturdy top handle for hand carrying and a long, thin shoulder strap attached at both sides, allowing for versatile carrying options. The front flap is secured with a small, square metallic clasp, adding a touch of understated elegance. The bag's surface appears to be made of a semi-rigid material, likely faux leather or coated fabric, with a matte finish. There are no visible decorative embellishments, keeping the design minimalistic and functional. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and suitable for urban environments.
description: A structured, light beige handbag with a subtle striped pattern, top handle, long shoulder strap, and a small square clasp on the front flap. The design is minimalistic and modern.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular body, top handle, and both ends of the shoulder strap; the clasp and flap are not visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, the attachment point of the shoulder strap, and the curvature of the top handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the front flap with a visible square clasp, the top handle, and the full length of the shoulder strap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and the other attachment point of the shoulder strap.
attribute_strap_type: One short, rigid top handle and one long, thin, non-adjustable shoulder or crossbody strap attached at both sides.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Square metallic clasp located at the center of the front flap.
attribute_pattern: Subtle vertical striped pattern resembling woodgrain.
